message:
chore(beads): close 15 beads — WASM deferred, conformance pipeline complete, E2E done

Closed as already-done or deferred:
- WASM chain (bd-1ry, bd-3w08, bd-ltk7, bd-10s6): no corpus extensions use WASM
- Conformance (bd-1we, bd-147, bd-2p8, bd-1gl.1, bd-1gl.2): work done via conformance pipeline
- E2E (bd-c4q, bd-2tn, bd-1d5i): all children closed
- Tests (bd-2xc, bd-xgo, bd-2tp): shim tests + conformance replace SWC pipeline
- Feature parity (bd-1uy, bd-25q): 18/18 blockers closed, 187/223 pass
